mapper.select: SELECT board_id, title FROM board WHERE board_id = #{board_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( target_type, reason, report_title, detail, status, created_date, member_id, board_id, comment_id, recipe_id, review_id ) VALUES ( #{target_type}, #{reason}, #{report_title}, #{detail}, '처리대기', NOW(), #{member_id}, #{board_id}, #{comment_id}, #{recipe_id}, #{review_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, m.name, m.nickname, m.email, m.profile_img FROM report r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY r.report_id DESC
